---

## Associated Paper

- **Title:** Scheduled Spatial Sensing against Adversarial WiFi Sensing
- **Venue:** IEEE PerCom 2023
- **Paper page:** [https://www.computer.org/csdl/proceedings-article/percom/2023/10099079/1MrG8Bbqka4](https://www.computer.org/csdl/proceedings-article/percom/2023/10099079/1MrG8Bbqka4)

---

## Reason for Tracking

This repository is tracked as an external reference relevant to the `wifi-csi-fall-detection` project for the following reasons:

- **WiFi sensing security:** Focused on anti-eavesdropping countermeasures against adversarial WiFi sensing attacks.
- **Scheduled spatial sensing:** Introduces a defense mechanism based on spatial sensing schedules to prevent unauthorized recognition of human behaviors via WiFi.
- **Adversarial WiFi sensing research context:** Directly relevant to the threat modeling and adversarial robustness goals of this repository.
- **Privacy protection:** Addresses privacy implications of WiFi-based human sensing, including scenarios where an adversary may attempt to infer user behaviors without consent.

---

## Relevance to This Repository

| Topic | Relevance |
|-------|-----------|
| WiFi sensing security | High — adversarial sensing attack surface directly applicable |
| Anti-eavesdropping defense | High — countermeasure design relevant to threat modeling |
| Privacy protection | High — user behavior privacy is a core concern |
| Activity recognition | Medium — context for the attack surface |
| Fall detection | Indirect — understanding adversarial context for sensing robustness |

## Usage Policy in This Repository

- This folder contains only this README tracking file.
- No code has been copied or adapted from AntiEave-WiFi-Sensing.
- No models or datasets from AntiEave-WiFi-Sensing have been integrated into the pipeline.
- This folder serves as a literature review reference and reproducibility planning note.
- Future integration (if any) requires explicit license verification and attribution.

---

## Dataset

The AntiEave-WiFi-Sensing repository includes a dataset folder used with the PerCom 2023 experiments.
This dataset is cataloged separately in `datasets/antieave-wifi-sensing/` with full provenance notes.
Dataset files are not downloaded or stored in this repository.
